case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, AS ASIGNEE OF HSBC BANK NEVADA,N.A. VS. THEODORA CARDOZA et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT CARDOZA, THEODORA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL, DECLARE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED, AND MONETARY SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, AS ASIGNEE OF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A.'S MOTION TO DECLARE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELAN LAMBERT, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, AS ASIGNEE OF HSBC BANK NEVADA,N.A. / DIRECT MERCHANTS BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARDOZA, THEODORA $2,781.41 PRINCIPAL, $695.35 ATTORNEY FEES, $290.00 COSTS, $310.00 SANCTIONS AWARDED JUNE 20, 2014, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,076.76, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing specially for Plaintiff CALVARY SPV I, LLC, a assignee of HSBC Bank Nevada, N.A., Direct Merchants Bank.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant THOEDORA CARDOZA.
Declaration pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Principal $2,781.41
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $695.35
Costs $290.00
Other: 310.00 Sanctions awarded on June 20, 2014.
Total Judgment in the amount of $4,076.76
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Set For Trial On Nov-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Declare Req.'S For Admissions Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cohen, Esq., 800.492.2657. for plaintiff; No other appearances.

RULING: Argued and the Court granted PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, AS ASIGNEE OF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A.'s Motion To Declare Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.
